title: Spellbound Weapons Better Combat Addons
description: Add BetterCombat to the weapons provided by Splatus's Spellbound Weapon datapack
body:
Add Better Combat compatabilities to [Spellbound Weaponds](https://modrinth.com/datapack/spellbound-weapons) using provided presets, each weapons now have their own unique animations, hitboxes and attributes.

Notes: Ocean Edge is unobtainable so it retains the default sword animation, however I did add some cool stuff to other easter eggs item like Spellbound Sword and [Delete]

Datapack need to be installed before you obtain a weapon, weapons obtained before installing the pack won't be updated. For more customization, visit my [Github](https://github.com/NMDx86/Spellbound-Weapons-BetterCombat)
